blockingIssues.description: Publishing remains enabled as soon as generated-user stubs exist, so a draft persona configuration can be published while a batch run is pending or running and background expansion/regeneration can still mutate synthetic users after publish.

The mixed-source router assertions are false positives because the mocked persona names already contain `Generated`, `Manual`, and `Transcript-derived`, so the test can pass even if the Source badges regress.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/environment.md` with the current pre-existing full-suite test blocker in `apps/browser-executor/src/browserLeaseDO.test.ts` and the approved targeted-validator fallback.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When mission guidance documents a known unrelated full-suite test failure, allow the mission-approved targeted test commands plus typecheck instead of treating `bun run test` as the only acceptable validator.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission `AGENTS.md` says to use targeted test commands because `apps/browser-executor/src/browserLeaseDO.test.ts` is a known pre-existing full-suite blocker, and the `generation-ui` handoff documents the resulting deviation from fullstack-worker step 6.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a test-writing checkpoint that UI assertions must target the specific rendered control or cell instead of whole-row substring matches when fixtures repeat the label under test.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `.factory/validation/generation-ui/scrutiny/reviews/cross-area-integration.json` found that `apps/web/src/router.test.tsx` asserted whole-row text contains `Generated`, `Manual`, and `Transcript-derived`, but the mocked persona names already contain those same words, creating false-positive badge coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Call out Convex validator/schema drift explicitly when Convex validators and internal Zod schemas both define the same generated payload shape, so generated API types do not become looser than the runtime contract.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `.factory/validation/generation-ui/scrutiny/reviews/fix-expansion-payload-bugs.json` found `convex/batchGeneration.ts` made `generatedUser.tensionSeed` optional in the Convex validator while `convex/batchGeneration/expansion.ts` still requires it in `expandedSyntheticUserPersistedSchema`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The `generation-ui` review noted that commit `f8eb27c` still failed the happy path because expansion payloads were invalid.
Persona-config publishing and batch-generation execution share a freeze contract.
Generation preview/count/cap logic is centralized in shared helpers.
Batch expansion should treat config-backed shared axes as canonical and ignore LLM-supplied axes.
Source-label rendering is centralized and should be asserted at that boundary instead of through whole-row text.
